name: Eurostat avia_paoa SDMX 2.1 API
description: Monthly passenger, movement, and cargo data for all European airports. 60,877 rows per monthly query.
known_issues: Queries spanning >12 months may trigger extraction-too-big errors. Chunk by month.
notes: Five dots (.....): all dimensions wildcarded. Returns TSV with gzip compression. Decompress before parsing.
